query:
SELECT s.id as sceneId, s.sceneIndex, s.mvSceneStatus as sceneStatus, s.taskId, s.updatedAt,
  p.pjlStatus as providerStatus, p.submittedAt, p.attemptNumber
FROM musicVideoScenes s
LEFT JOIN providerJobLogs p ON p.sceneId = s.id AND p.pjlStatus IN ('submitted', 'failed')
WHERE s.jobId = 450002 AND s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating'
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT s.id as sceneId, s.sceneIndex, s.mvSceneStatus as sceneStatus, s.taskId, s.updatedAt,
  p.pjlStatus as providerStatus, p.submittedAt, p.attemptNumber
FROM musicVideoScenes s
LEFT JOIN providerJobLogs p ON p.sceneId = s.id AND p.pjlStatus IN ('submitted', 'failed')
WHERE s.jobId = 450002 AND s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating'
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
